signals.headline: Contact Trade Commissioner Service (TCS) India desk
signals.summary: Uranium Export – $2.6B bilateral deal creates immediate compliance window for contract registration under new CEPA tariff codes within 30 days of entry.

signals.headline: Contact Trade Commissioner for India Market Entry
signals.summary: Global Affairs Canada (GAC) India desk—secure dedicated briefing on $3.4B bilateral deals framework and critical minerals buyer contacts within 48 hours.

signals.headline: Contact Trade Commissioner Service (TCS) India Desk
signals.summary: TCS India team provides real-time pulse quota intelligence and buyer introductions. Engage this week to secure placement in procurement cycles before quota fill.

signals.headline: Screen Trade Commissioner Advanced Manufacturing Network
signals.summary: Trade Commissioner Service (TCS) has real-time market alerts on Section 232 impacts and CUSMA-eligible sectors. Access this week to align export strategy with tariff timeline.

signals.headline: Register with Trade Commissioner Service Market Alert
signals.summary: Contact your regional TCS office to enroll in EU AI Act regulatory updates—direct access to compliance timelines and vendor registration links launches today. TCS eligibility unlocks priority briefing

signals.headline: Screen Trade Commissioner Network Germany Desk
signals.summary: Contact Global Affairs Canada's Trade Commissioner Service for real-time German Bundeswehr vendor introductions. High urgency given €100B modernisation window closing within 60 days.
